summary: ChainBridge ERC20Handler treated WETH deposits as native ETH, letting attacker mint mapped tokens by sending zero-value calls with arbitrary amount params.
attack_trace: Call deposit on ERC20Handler with zero msg.value, large amount param
Handler emits Deposit event without actual transfer
Bridge mints corresponding token on destination
root_cause: ERC20Handler conflated msg.value (native) and amount (ERC-20) when checking deposit validity.
